title: State of U.S. Blockade Is Unclear as Some Ships Transit Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: Ship-tracking data showed that several vessels, including some that had been docked at Iranian ports, had moved through the strait as the U.S. military began its blockade.
summary_public: Ship-tracking data showed that several vessels, including some that had been docked at Iranian ports, had moved through the strait as the U.S. military began its blockade.
